sentences.arabic: الْخُبْزُ الْعَرَبِيُّ أَسَاسُ الطَّعَامِ فِي كَثِيرٍ مِنَ الْبُلْدَانِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapski hljeb temelj je prehrane u mnogim arapskim zemljama.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic bread is the foundation of food in many Arab countries.

sentences.arabic: يُؤْكَلُ الْخُبْزُ مَعَ الْحُمُّصِ وَالزَّيْتُونِ وَالْجُبْنِ فِي وَجْبَةِ الْإِفْطَارِ.
sentences.translation: Jede se uz humus, masline i sir za doručak.
sentences.translationEn: It is eaten with hummus, olives, and cheese at breakfast.

sentences.arabic: يُخْبَزُ الْخُبْزُ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ فِي الْفُرْنِ وَتَمْلَأُ رَائِحَتُهُ الطَّيِّبَةُ الْبَيْتَ.
sentences.translation: Hljeb se svaki dan peče u pećnici i njegov divni miris ispunjava kuću.
sentences.translationEn: Bread is baked every day in the oven and its wonderful smell fills the house.

sentences.arabic: لَا تَكْتَمِلُ الْوَجْبَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ بِدُونِ الْخُبْزِ الطَّازَجِ.
sentences.translation: Nijedan arapski obrok nije potpun bez svježeg hljeba.
sentences.translationEn: No Arab meal is complete without fresh bread.
